feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Analytics Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP Analytics Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Adding Custom Tooltips or Popups for Comments/Links in Table Cells in SAP Analytics Cloud Story
entry.content:
Hey everyone!

I want to allow users to enter information (like a comment, explanation, or external link) that will not be visible in the main table, but instead will only appear:

  • When the user actively clicks a specific button

  • Or, when clicking on a specific cell or icon within the cell

This would ideally open a popup or floating window that displays the hidden content — like a comment or hyperlink — without cluttering the table itself.

My question:

Is there a way in SAP Analytics Cloud to implement such a mechanism?
Either through scripting, pop-up logic on onSelect events, or a custom widget?
I'd love to hear how others may have handled similar needs for clean tables with context hidden behind user interaction.

Thanks in advance for any tips, examples, or directions!

Best regards,
Elad Tayar

entry.title: Restrict Data Point Comments visibility to individual users in SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
Hi everyone,
After enabling Allow Data Point Comments on a table in my SAP Analytics Cloud Story, I would like to know if is there a way to restrict the visibility of comments so that they are personal per user and not visible to all other users interacting with the same story/table?

If yes – I’d really appreciate some guidance on how to implement this.
If not – are there any alternative solutions to allow users to add private notes or comments on specific data cells?

Thank you in advance for your help!

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud - Content Material
entry.content:
Hi friends,

I’m currently preparing several presentations about the SAC and was wondering if anyone has any good recommendations for informative materials I could use.

I’d really appreciate any helpful sources you can share.

Looking forward to your suggestions!

Kind regards,
Ismail

entry.title: Can we copy unreleased CDS view code and use it for developing custom CDS views?
entry.content:
In the Fiori View Browser app, I can see a lot of CDS views are marked as Not released for development. I was wondering if we can use eclipse to directly copy the CDS view code and create a custom one. Reason being we need to enhance a CDS view but are not able to using standard apps due to the CDS view marked as not released for development. 

 

What would be implications or drawbacks of this approach?

entry.title: SAC roles/teams issue
entry.content:
I have shared the Job Family data with two teams, and only three users—who are members of those teams—should have access to it. However, it appears that other users who are not part of these teams are also able to view the Human Resources and Training data.

Can anyone please help me to fix the issue?

entry.title: How to move amount when update new GL in SAC
entry.content: i Have issue in SAC, in SAC have update new GL account but, the amount is already fill up and already calculate in report that mean is already in MID_FINANCE data modeler. what is any step to move that amount to be in new GL?

entry.title: SAP SAC Intgerated Financial Planning Calculating product costs
entry.content:
Hello All,

I'm trying to calculate the product cost rate in SAC but haven’t been able to get any results. I have four products — Product A, Product B, Product C, and Product D.

  • Product A and Product B are tagged to local sales GL accounts,

  • While Product B and Product C are tagged to export sales GL accounts,

  • This classification is based on the Distribution Channel property, where:

    • 10 = Local

    • 20 = Export

Each product has its own COGS values stored in the relevant leaf members of the following GL accounts:

  • 50301000 – COGS Direct Material

  • 50302000 – COGS Third Party

  • 50304000 – COGS Personnel Time

  • 50305000 – COGS Machine Time

  • 50307000 – COGS Production Overhead

Below is the code I'm executing to calculate product cost rate:

IF [d/SAP__FI_IFP_GLACCOUNT] = BASEMEMBER([d/SAP__FI_IFP_GLACCOUNT], "22") THEN // Gross Revenue
DATA([d/Measures] = #QUANTITY,[d/SAP__FI_IFP_GLACCOUNT] = "#",[d/Date] = #DATE) =
RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures] = "QUANTITY", [d/Version] = "public.Actual", [d/Date] = PREVIOUS(12)) *-1
ENDIF


IF [d/SAP__FI_IFP_GLACCOUNT] = BASEMEMBER([d/SAP__FI_IFP_GLACCOUNT], "21") THEN // COGS
DATA([d/Measures] = #AMOUNT, [d/Date] = #DATE) =
RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures] = "AMOUNT", [d/Version] = "public.Actual", [d/Date] = PREVIOUS(12))
ENDIF

IF [d/SAP__FI_IFP_GLACCOUNT] = BASEMEMBER([d/SAP__FI_IFP_GLACCOUNT], "21") THEN // COGS
DATA([d/Measures] = "PRICE") = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures] = #AMOUNT, [d/Date] = #DATE)
/RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures] = #QUANTITY, [d/Date] = #DATE,[d/SAP__FI_IFP_GLACCOUNT] = "#")
ENDIF

Despite this logic, no results are returned, and I’m unsure why. 

When I run the code separately, it gives me the correct results, but when performing the division, it doesn't display the result.

//IF [d/SAP__FI_IFP_GLACCOUNT] = BASEMEMBER([d/SAP__FI_IFP_GLACCOUNT], "22") THEN // Gross Revenue
//DATA([d/Measures] = #QUANTITY,[d/SAP__FI_IFP_GLACCOUNT] = "#",[d/Date] = #DATE) =
//RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures] = "QUANTITY", [d/Version] = "public.Actual", [d/Date] = PREVIOUS(12)) *-1
//ENDIF


IF [d/SAP__FI_IFP_GLACCOUNT] = BASEMEMBER([d/SAP__FI_IFP_GLACCOUNT], "21") THEN // COGS
DATA([d/Measures] = #AMOUNT, [d/Date] = #DATE) =
RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures] = "AMOUNT", [d/Version] = "public.Actual", [d/Date] = PREVIOUS(12))
ENDIF

IF [d/SAP__FI_IFP_GLACCOUNT] = BASEMEMBER([d/SAP__FI_IFP_GLACCOUNT], "21") THEN // COGS
DATA([d/Measures] = "PRICE") = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures] = #AMOUNT, [d/Date] = #DATE)
//RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures] = #QUANTITY, [d/Date] = #DATE,[d/SAP__FI_IFP_GLACCOUNT] = "#")
ENDIF

 

 

 

Could someone please help identify the issue or suggest the correct approach?

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud - Level Hierarchy - Help please
entry.content:
Hi,

I have created a simple Level Hierarchy (Ex: Region, Sub-Region like Central, Texas). When I am saving the dimension table, it prompted for a mandatory selection for the member Id, i have selected # Unassigned. I have saved it.

When i use it in the story, I see only the selected default member (# unassigned). I tried selecting a state, and I see only that member and also the data is not filtering - it shows for complete hierarchy.

I have attached the screenshots. Am I missing something?

entry.title: I need to allocate the plan values based on Actuals.
entry.content:
I have created a input form where project vales against the GLs are available for actual for previous year.

I am entering the Plan values at Project # at GL level

I want to allocate the plan values to the project based on the actuals . I have written the allocate data action but it is not working . Need inputs .

I have tried using a reference account and Calculated measure as a driver both.

When i try this allocation in same version , it is working ( means if i try the entire process in actuals / plan its working ) but when i refer the values from actuals using the calculated account/ measure and run the data action in plan it is not working 

@N1kh1l  - i referred a similar blog which you answered and tried out the steps in a similar way but i am not getting the allocation data action running .Kindly help me if i am missing any point

entry.title: How to connect from SAC to Azure SFTP server to load data from a text file
entry.content:
Hi Experts.

How to connect from SAC to Azure SFTP server to load data from a pipe separated values file, into a public dimension. Looks to me this is a most common issue.

Main challenge is to make sure that connection is established to a SFTP server on an Azure cloud server, as it is not standard for SAC.

Later scheduling a job picking up a named file can be done in SAC, like any other connections, after mapping, and transformations etc. 

Thanks in advance,

SP.

entry.title: SAC Account formula member - Lookup not working
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I've created a dummy model in SAP Analytics Cloud  and I was trying to setup a account formula member using LOOKUP function, but it's not working:

Why is this happening? Also, it happens with other dimensions, they're not recognized.

Btw, the account dimension in my dummy model is public.

Thanks for the help!

entry.title: In a stroy there are input controls like Countries, when we select the Country India.
entry.content: In a story there are Input control Country, where we select Country India or USA then Title should show the selected Input control Name at the top of the Story.

entry.title: Guidance on Transferring Measures/Dimensions to New SAC Stories
entry.content:
Hi Colleagues,

We are in the process of transitioning our content and dashboards to the new SAC Toolkit. However, for some stories, we have custom calculations, calculated dimensions, and calculated measures.

Do you know if there is a way to transfer these elements directly into the new SAC story? The new stories will be based on the same data model, and we would like to avoid recreating them from scratch.

Your guidance on this would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you in advance!
Best Regards,
Ali Akbalik

entry.title: Propogate a freshly calculated product cost as material cost in another product in SAC
entry.content:
Hi Experts, 

Please guide: I am using the integrated financial planning - standard product cost planning, I have a requirement explained below

Below are cost estimated of 2 products P1 and P2. Here, P1 is again used as a material in P2 manufacturing. Thus if I updated the price in cost estimate of P1 and its overall values changes then it should also reflect in P2 estimate with newly updated cost in material P1.

I tried below script to move the newly update  cost of product P1 to Material P1 in product P2, but it doesn't work as expected. 

N1kh1l

#SACADVANCEDFORMULA #SAPANALYTICSCLOUD #INTEGRATED FINANCIAL PLANNING

entry.title: Classic Story deprecation deadline in SAC Analytics cloud
entry.content:
Hello All,

Could you please let us know what is the deadline for classic design story deprecated?

Regards

Sravani

entry.title: How to create delta keyfigure in a SAC story table
entry.content:
hi,

i would like to calcualte the delta for different keyfigures.

All the different keyfigures are in the rows (1)

in columns

Current Period, Previous period,

Delta (To calculate) (3)

What to do in SAC that i can create the delta column as on the screenshot ?

entry.title: How to add a calculated column in SAC story without scripting
entry.content:
hi,

how i can generate this calculated column in a sac story table object without scripting?

different measures are in the rows

entry.title: Loading Master and Transactional Data from Datasphere into SAC - Seamless Planing
entry.content:
Hi,

i have created a planning model in SAC, which is also stored and managed in SAP Datasphere.

To load master data and transactional data from Datasphere views into my model, the only method I have found so far is to create OData service connections.

Since I’m working with multiple dimensions, this approach results in a large number of individual connections being visible in SAC, which significantly reduces clarity and usability.

My questions:

  1. Is this currently the only way to integrate master and transactional data from Datasphere views into a SAC planning model that is also stored in Datasphere?

  2. In the context of Seamless Planning, would this OData-based approach be considered appropriate – or are there best practices that suggest otherwise?

Thank you in advance for your support and feedback.

entry.title: The results of the data action "XXXXXXX" could not be published on version "yyyy".
entry.content:
Hello, 

One user getting below error message when publish the data action from story. The data action is having 3 steps which copy data from different model.

All steps are running fine, but when publish step comes then it shows below error

The results of the data action "XXXXXXX" could not be published on version "yyyy". You don't have the resources available to publish this version. Please try again later." 

The strange part is that, when I run the data action I am able to do it without any issue. I am the owner of that model.

There is a KBA from SAP, but I am not getting as what to change here because I am able to run the data action without any issue.

https://me.sap.com/notes/0003618840

Thanks.

entry.title: BASEMEMBER as IF input
entry.content:
I'd like to implement this logic dynamically, taking the attribute from another dimension. If a BASEMEMBER could be used as an input for an IF statement, it would be as follows; however, this isn't possible:

IF [d/CECO] = BASEMEMBER([d/CECO], [d/CICLO].[p/Receiver_CC]) THEN
ENDIF

Do you know of any way to do this?

Thank you very much!
